test.command: ssh root@192.168.1.198 'docker run --rm --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video -v /opt/mi50grad:/opt/mi50grad mi50grad bash -c ...' (test_gemv_int4_v5.py, test_kernel_p2p_allreduce.py, test_awq_gemv.py, test_awq_loader.py)
test.notes: All Sprint 4 unit tests pass: gemv_int4_v5 correctness/perf (VAL-DPP-001/002), kernel_p2p_allreduce correctness/latency (VAL-KP2P-001/003), AWQ GEMV correctness (VAL-AWQ-002), AWQ loader correctness (VAL-AWQ-001). All test assertions pass with max_abs_error < 1e-3 and latency within thresholds.

typecheck.command: N/A - project uses HIP C++ kernels + Python scripts without static type checking configured
typecheck.notes: No mypy/pyright configuration present. HIP kernels compile cleanly with hipcc.

lint.command: ssh root@192.168.1.198 'docker run ... hipcc -O3 --offload-arch=gfx906 -std=c++17 -shared -fPIC gemv_int4_v5.hip gemv_int4_v5_awq.hip kernel_p2p_allreduce.hip'
lint.notes: All 3 new Sprint 4 HIP kernel files compile for gfx906 with exit code 0. C runtime extensions (c_dispatch.so, c_dispatch_v2.so, c_graph_dispatch.so, fast_allreduce.so) also compile cleanly.

reviewsSummary.notes: scrutiny-feature-reviewer subagent unavailable (model configuration error: custom:CCS-sonnet not found). Review performed directly by scrutiny-validator, consistent with round 1 behavior documented in prior synthesis.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Deploy and rebuild note' to Sprint 4 Final Benchmark section documenting that all 4 .so files (fast_allreduce.so, c_dispatch.so, c_dispatch_v2.so, c_graph_dispatch.so) are removed by rsync --delete and must be rebuilt after every deploy. Includes copy-paste build commands and reference to services.yaml.

rejectedObservations.observation: AWQ kernel mode not wired into C dispatch plan (set_awq_mode(True) uses cached+stream path)
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — already documented in library/architecture.md under 'AWQ E2E Integration' section: 'The AWQ kernel is only active in the uncached serial path. When C dispatch is active, the C dispatch plan uses GPTQ kernel function pointers and ignores _awq_mode.'
